nl: Which product category had the highest total revenue?
sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT STRFTIME(order_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE YEAR(order_date) = 2024 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

nl: Who are the top 10 customers by total spend?
sql: SELECT c.name, c.email, ROUND(SUM(o.total_amount), 2) AS total_spend FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name, c.email ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 10

nl: What is the average order value by country?
sql: SELECT c.country, ROUND(AVG(o.total_amount), 2) AS avg_order_value, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

nl: What percentage of orders were cancelled or returned in each month of 2024?
sql: SELECT STRFTIME(order_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('cancelled','returned') THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_cancelled_or_returned FROM orders WHERE YEAR(order_date) = 2024 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
